summary: Frontend dark mode testing completed. Verified dark mode implementation across all screens. Login page renders correctly with light theme. Dashboard, Profile, Services, Appointments, Cash, Loyalty, Schedule, Products, Reports tabs all properly use useTheme() hook. Dark mode toggle in Profile tab works correctly. Theme persists via AsyncStorage. All screens show correct background (#121212 dark, #F5F5F5 light), text colors (#E8E8E8 dark, #333333 light), card backgrounds (#1E1E1E dark, #FFFFFF light), header (#1A1A2E dark, #007AFF light), and tab bar (#1A1A1A dark, #FFFFFF light) colors.

minor.issue: Some API calls triggering mixed content warnings (HTTP vs HTTPS) in console logs, but requests still work

seed_data_creation: Created test session for test_barber_001 user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode implementation is complete and working. All 9 tabs tested: Dashboard, Appointments, Services, Products, Cash, Schedule, Loyalty, Reports, Profile. Theme toggle in Profile tab works correctly. ThemeContext provides lightTheme and darkTheme with all necessary color values. All shared components (Card, Button, Input) properly consume theme via useTheme() hook. Tab layout and root layout both apply theme colors to navigation elements.

tested_features.login_page_light_mode: PASS - Login page renders with light theme by default (light background, dark text, white cards)
tested_features.google_oauth_button: PASS - Google login button navigates to Emergent Auth
tested_features.dashboard_themed: PASS - Dashboard shows themed welcome, stats cards, warning card, appointments list
tested_features.tab_bar_themed: PASS - Tab bar shows correct background (#1A1A1A dark, #FFFFFF light) and icon colors
tested_features.header_themed: PASS - Header shows themed background (#1A1A2E dark, #007AFF light) and text color
tested_features.profile_dark_mode_toggle: PASS - Dark mode switch in Profile tab works and persists theme
tested_features.appointments_dark: PASS - Appointments tab shows dark background, themed filter bar, styled cards
tested_features.services_dark: PASS - Services tab shows dark background, themed button, empty state icon
tested_features.products_dark: PASS - Products tab shows themed cards with price boxes, switch toggles, modals
tested_features.cash_dark: PASS - Cash register shows themed cards, modals, balance display
tested_features.schedule_dark: PASS - Schedule shows themed day cards, time chips, modal forms
tested_features.loyalty_dark: PASS - Loyalty shows themed config card, client cards with progress bars
tested_features.reports_dark: PASS - Reports shows themed period selector, stat cards, chart elements
tested_features.card_component: PASS - Card component properly uses theme.card and theme.border
tested_features.button_component: PASS - Button component uses theme.primary, theme.inputBg for variants
tested_features.input_component: PASS - Input component uses theme.inputBg, theme.inputBorder, theme.text
tested_features.modal_dialogs_dark: PASS - Modal backgrounds use theme.background, headers use theme.card

mocked_apis_note: WhatsApp Business API is MOCKED - only logs messages
